message:
feat(plan): Add Plan DAG IR module for concurrency combinator rewrites

New plan Module (src/plan/mod.rs):
- Define PlanId identifier for plan DAG nodes
- Define PlanNode enum with Leaf, Join, Race, and Timeout variants
- Add PlanArena for arena-based node allocation
- Implement children() iterator for traversing node dependencies
- Implement cycle detection via topological order validation
- Add PlanBuilder for ergonomic DAG construction
- Add render_ascii() for debug visualization of plan structure

This module provides an intermediate representation for expressing and
optimizing concurrent execution plans before lowering to runtime tasks.
The DAG structure enables static analysis and optimization of join/race
trees.

Library Integration:
- Export plan module from lib.rs
- Add documentation entry to module docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
